text:
Market today: Wholesale prices fell unexpectedly, which could ease inflation fears. This is good for growth names, but the headline about "gambling" vs. "value" and the AI bull market theme suggest sentiment is still a big driver.
Your holdings: SOXL is "SELL" and down 28.68%. SPAL is "NEW" and down 35.75%. Both are leveraged and decaying, and with margin, these drops hurt.
Watch: Keep an eye on the AI theme meter. Also, watch for any news on chip demand or supply.
Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching the AI narrative.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or stopping out given the "SELL" status and leveraged decay.
SPAL: Monitor closely; consider stop-out if further downside occurs given "NEW" status and leverage.
AMD: If you're looking for new exposure, scanner shows BUY setup (entry 553.23-552.67, stop 551.17).
